steps.title: Use the 2010 contrast
steps.content: The sentence already says no country in the graph had more than 2 women on its high court in 1980. The example should therefore use 2010 data showing a higher number.

steps.title: Check the graph evidence
steps.content: A focuses on whether numbers decreased over time, B gives only Mexico's values, and C compares increases rather than giving the needed 2010 contrast. The statement that Sri Lanka, the Philippines, and Mexico each had 3 women in 2010 supplies exactly the needed evidence. The answer is D.
